headline: Merger of two water companies serving NEPA gets hearing in Scranton
summary: The Pennsylvania Public Utility Commission will hold a hearing in Scranton next month on a proposed merger of American Water Works, which is the parent firm of Pennsylvania American Water, and Essential Utilities, the parent company of Aqua Pennsylvania. On Thursday, the PUC issued a schedule of in-person and telephonic hearings to be held in late April and early May throughout the state on ...

headline: Why Is American Water Works (AWK) Up 4.4% Since Last Earnings Report?
summary: American Water Works (AWK) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.
